CommunityApplications.Profile: Touch LCD dashboard and smart front-panel LEDs for the UGREEN NASync iDX6011 Pro, running natively on Unraid - no UGOS required. Seven swipeable pages of live stats on the 258x960 front touchscreen (CPU, memory, per-interface network, per-disk temps/usage/health, GPU/NPU, power draw, array and notifications, docker) plus an interactive touch Settings page, and smart power/LAN/disk LEDs driven from SMART health and link state. Self-contained install with a SHA256-verified payload; model-gated via DMI so it no-ops on other hardware. Requires the BIOS Watchdog Timer disabled and the panel EFI entry set first in the BIOS boot order - see the project README before installing.
